title: [codereview-P2 pass1] schema.json ccp16_document added but ccp16-desync.json not yet present; consider array root support in top-level oneOf
description: Review finding: dedicated ccp16_document mirrors others but bare-array v2 files like ccp16-desync require additional oneOf branch for array of ccp_vector per project-LICHEN-b7dh. No P0 correctness issue. File as codereview.
close_reason: Updated schema for array root/oneOf, added ccp16_document support. No new file created.
